emergency_definition: forced door alarm at healthcare site
non_emergency_routing_rules: Capture account ID, site name, and preferred callback number

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: Your security case is marked high priority and our monitoring lead will contact you shortly

integration_constraints: no password reset actions by voice agent
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency transfers go to overnight monitoring desk; non-emergency should collect details and provide next-day callback expectation
notes: Keep language calm, authoritative, and concise
